name: Apple and Fennel Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the Granny Smith apples.
2. Wash the spinach thoroughly, removing any fibrous stems. Dry it completely and place it in a salad bowl.
3. Add the sliced fennel, apples, and onions to the bowl.
4. Toss with celery seed dressing.
5. Garnish with fennel tops.
Serves 6.
